recipe_followed_in_code.evidence: dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts, colData = metadata, design = ~ cell_type)
recipe_followed_in_code.why: Uses DESeq2::DESeqDataSetFromMatrix with the canonical design formula, matching the deseq2-r recipe API exactly.

method_validity.why: Columns are individual cells, not biological replicates. Applying DESeq2 directly across single cells is pseudoreplication; DESeq2 requires independent biological samples, not cells.

fabrication.why: Data is read from files on disk; no synthetic or invented values are produced.
